record_types.name: CLKCR_Register
CMD_Register

fields.name: WAITINT
fields.description: CPSM Waits for ends of data transfer (CmdPend internal signal).

fields.name: WAITPEND
fields.description: Command path state machine (CPSM) Enable bit

record_types.name: DCOUNT_Register
DCTRL_Register

fields.name: DTDIR
fields.description:
Data transfer mode selection 1: Stream or SDIO multibyte data
transfer.

record_types.name: DLEN_Register
FIFOCNT_Register
ICR_Register
MASK_Register

fields.name: DTIMEOUTIE
fields.description: Tx FIFO underrun error interrupt enable

fields.name: TXUNDERRIE
fields.description: Rx FIFO overrun error interrupt enable

fields.name: RXACTIE
fields.description: Tx FIFO half empty interrupt enable

fields.name: TXFIFOHEIE
fields.description: Rx FIFO half full interrupt enable

fields.name: RXFIFOEIE
fields.description: Data available in Tx FIFO interrupt enable

fields.name: TXDAVLIE
fields.description: Data available in Rx FIFO interrupt enable

fields.name: RXDAVLIE
fields.description: SDIO mode interrupt received interrupt enable

fields.name: SDIOITIE
fields.description: CE-ATA command completion signal received interrupt enable

record_types.name: POWER_Register
RESPCMD_Register
SDIO_Peripheral
STA_Register

fields.name: CCRCFAIL
fields.description: Read-only. Data block sent/received (CRC check failed)

fields.name: RXOVERR
fields.description: Read-only. Command response received (CRC check passed)

fields.name: CMDSENT
fields.description: Read-only. Data end (data counter, SDIDCOUNT, is zero)

fields.name: DATAEND
fields.description:
Read-only. Start bit not detected on all data signals in wide bus
mode

fields.name: STBITERR
fields.description: Read-only. Data block sent/received (CRC check passed)

fields.name: RXACT
fields.description:
Read-only. Transmit FIFO half empty: at least 8 words can be written
into the FIFO

fields.name: TXFIFOHE
fields.description:
Read-only. Receive FIFO half full: there are at least 8 words in the
FIFO

fields.name: RXFIFOE
fields.description: Read-only. Data available in transmit FIFO

fields.name: TXDAVL
fields.description: Read-only. Data available in receive FIFO

fields.name: SDIOIT
fields.description: Read-only. CE-ATA command completion signal received for CMD61

variables.name: SDIO_Periph
variables.code:
SDIO_Periph : aliased SDIO_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => SDIO_Base;
